reason: PROP-016 Mech A: generate-html.js is a NEVER_PUSH infrastructure file. Decider cannot self-apply. Stranded for operator manual application.
description: WIN-054 was reclassified to Self-Contradicted, but generate-html.js still references it as a Not-Demonstrated example. The methodology section reads: "Pure false-dilemma — correctly identifying a genuine anomaly without offering dome physics — is Not Demonstrated rather than Misleading; WIN-054 (El Gordo) is the reference case for this distinction." This should reference a current Not-Demonstrated WIN instead (e.g., WIN-011 Mohe 1997 gravity anomaly) or drop the specific WIN citation.
find_text: Pure false-dilemma — correctly identifying a genuine anomaly without offering dome physics — is Not Demonstrated rather than Misleading; WIN-054 (El Gordo) is the reference case for this distinction.
replace_with_option_a: Pure false-dilemma — correctly identifying a genuine anomaly without offering dome physics — is Not Demonstrated rather than Misleading; WIN-011 (Mohe 1997 gravity anomaly) is one reference case for this distinction.
replace_with_option_b: Pure false-dilemma — correctly identifying a genuine anomaly without offering dome physics — is Not Demonstrated rather than Misleading.
operator_action: 1) cd to your clone with direct push. 2) Edit build-scripts/generate-html.js with one of the above options. 3) Run node build.js html && node test.js. 4) git commit -am "fix: generate-html WIN-054 methodology reference (ISS-2094)" && git push. 5) Close ISS-2094 with status=fixed.
tombstone_applied_method: Option A (replace_with_option_a) — WIN-054 reference replaced with WIN-011 (Mohe 1997 gravity anomaly) in build-scripts/generate-html.js line 1726
tombstone_note: Replaces false-closure (decider hallucinated this fix on 2026-05-18; tinker FND-01 documented the discrepancy on 2026-05-25 and filed HNOTE-OPERATOR-ISS-2094-FALSE-CLOSURE-001). ISS-2094 also closed in open-issues.json -> closed-issues.json with verification_pattern set so a future false-closure on the same target file would be caught immediately by the git show + grep verification check.
